stories.title: Indonesia’s palm oil output slips as CPO stocks rise
stories.summary: Indonesia’s palm oil production declined while crude palm oil stocks increased. Open the original report for detailed production, export and inventory figures.

stories.title: B50 and Indonesia’s palm oil trilemma: food, energy and exports
stories.summary: The B50 programme increases palm oil’s role in energy while creating new trade-offs for domestic food supply and exports.

stories.title: Malaysia poised to gain as Indonesia reduces exportable supply
stories.summary: MPOC says Malaysia may gain market share if Indonesia’s B50 mandate diverts more palm oil into domestic consumption.

stories.title: Palm oil advances as crude rally improves the biofuel outlook
stories.summary: Palm oil gained as stronger crude prices improved demand prospects for biofuels.

stories.title: From plantation to power: FGV expands palm oil’s possibilities
stories.summary: FGV is testing B100 biodiesel as part of a phased renewable-energy programme.
